title: Renewable Diamonds│可再生鑽石
description: Wither Skeletons have a chance to drop diamonds.│凋零骷髏有概率掉落鑽石。
body:
# Function│功能
Wither Skeletons have a 2.5% chance of dropping a diamond when killed, and the chance increases by 1% for each level of Looting enchantment on the weapon.│凋零骷髏被擊殺後有2.5%概率掉落一顆鑽石，武器上的每一級掠奪附魔會使概率+1%。
